subject: Re: Gold removal in WarpTools
body:
Hi Felix,
BoxNet is still not in place in WarpTools so you’d have to use an external program for this for the moment - Connor Garrels at OHSU put together a protocol for doing this with fidder
Tomogram Reconstruction and Gold Fiducial Removal with Warp, Etomo, and Fidder
protocols.io
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Apr 18, 2025, at 19:10, Felix Lange <felix.lange.le@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿Hi guys,
what is the common procedure to remove gold fiducials in WarpTools? Can I feed in the masks made with Warp 1.0.9 or use fidder?
Thanks and best,
Felix
